allow: Bash(ls .venv/Scripts/python.exe 2>/dev/null || ls venv/Scripts/python.exe 2>/dev/null || which python3 2>/dev/null || where python 2>/dev/null)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import subprocess, re
result = subprocess.run\(['wmic', 'path', 'win32_VideoController', 'get', 'name'], capture_output=True, text=True\)
print\(result.stdout\)
" 2>&1)
